ABS and Traction control pump system electrical failure. Went to a Dodge Dealer and had the system read due to light coming on and off. Originally started around 38,000 miles on the truck. A code came up C0020-01. ABS pump motor control electrical failure. Researched on the net.

narrative.headline: What 2018 Ram 3500 owners report most
narrative.summary: Brake-related complaints dominate owner reports for this truck, with drivers describing unexpected vehicle acceleration when the brake pedal is pressed, loss of braking effectiveness, and related warning lights activating while underway. Electrical and hydraulic brake system failures, including inoperative trailer brake integration and ABS failure, make up a substantial share of remaining complaints. A smaller but notable group of owners report cruise control that fails to disengage and instead increases speed when the driver attempts to cancel it.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle accelerating rather than slowing when the brake pedal is depressed, sometimes accompanied by a hill assist warning indicator illuminating on the dash. · 1 fire · 9 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the integrated brake system for trailer towing failing to function, leaving the truck unable to adequately stop a towed load despite multiple dealer repair attempts. · 1 crash

issues.title: Hydraulic
issues.blurb: Owners report the ABS unit becoming inoperable without warning, with simultaneous loss of traction control and hydraulic braking function while driving. · 4 crash

issues.title: Vehicle Speed Control
issues.blurb: Owners report cruise control failing to disengage when commanded, with vehicle speed increasing incrementally each time the driver attempts to cancel the system, including when holding the cancel button.

issues.sample: ABS and Traction control pump system electrical failure. Went to a Dodge Dealer and had the system read due to light coming on and off. Originally started around 38,000 miles on the truck. A code came up C0020-01. ABS pump motor control electrical failure. Researched on the net.
